headline: Geometry/layout is FAITHFUL to the PDF (overlay-proven). Only CONFIRMED_BUG = scale.

findings.evidence: 7 PDF door swing-arcs measured vs consensus opening widths -> ratio 0.98-1.09; h_o000=1.16m and h_o005=1.25m are genuinely wide doors in the PDF.
consensus walls overlay exactly on the PDF perimeter incl. steps; all 35 walls axis-aligned.
consensus room polygons fill within walls on the overlay; gates floors_separated_from_walls=true, default_material_faces_zero=true.

findings.suspicion: blue glass dominant / windows look empty
findings.evidence: 5 glass elements 0.05-0.09m from opening centers (placed). Geometry correct; render does not communicate thin/transparent glass.
known_warnings.json open-plan: 8 cells vs 11 semantic ambients.

confirmed_bugs.evidence: builder PT_TO_M=0.19/5.4=0.03519 vs PDF cotas 5.45/2.60/2.40 -> ~0.0252 m/pt (~1.40x too big). Overlay proves consensus faithful in pdf-points, so error is purely the pt->m anchor.
confirmed_bugs.fix: ENV['PT_TO_M'] override in build_plan_shell_skp.rb (default unchanged, no fixture mutation). planta_74 @0.0252 -> PlanShell 12.71x7.53m, gates pass, pytest 223 passed.
confirmed_bugs.render_note: scale change looks subtle (zoom_extents auto-fit); fidelity gain = correct absolute dimensions, cota-proven.
